name: Chicken Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked chicken or turkey, cube
recipeInstructions:
1. Place broccoli in a greased 11x7x2 baking dish; set aside.
2. Combine chicken, soup, mayo, cheese and curry powder; spoon over broccoli.
3. Top with bread cubes and butter.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until heated through.
